governing_requirement: Every bridge failure code must deterministically fix category, retryability, affected scope, completion-profile impact, remediation, permitted lifecycle transition and no-fallback reason across the required failure domains; contradictions and unknown errors must fail closed.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-09.06 remains blocked by its declared prerequisites and by the missing additive deterministic decision fields. Existing closed-schema and semantic-matrix foundations receive partial credit.

prior_evidence.disposition: Accepted for requirement mapping, probes and the additive implementation packet. Prerequisite states are superseded by the current tracker.

verified_foundations: The frozen v1 schema and BRIDGE_ERROR_POLICY contain exactly the same closed set of 37 error codes.
The semantic validator deterministically binds each known code to category, retryability, impact scope, remediation action, replacement-route requirement, delay rule and runbook-binding rule.
Direct contradictions in category, retryability, impact scope and remediation action are rejected by error_policy_matrix.
Unknown error codes are rejected by the frozen schema enum, and no_silent_fallback is fixed true.
The focused positive and repair/error-policy tests pass and Ruff reports no issues on the governing source and test file.

direct_probes.mutation: Replace every required affected_scope array with an empty array for a policy-consistent SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE error.
direct_probes.gap: Affected scope is structurally present but is neither nonempty nor derived per error code.

confirmed_gaps: Affected scope is not code-specific: all five required arrays may be empty and no normalized request, identity, transform, artifact, authority, release or capability facts are used to derive it.

The frozen record and in-code tuple have no completion-profile impact decision, so optional independent-real-accuracy or DAZ-maturity failure is not distinguished from core-autonomous-runtime failure.
No permitted lifecycle transition is fixed per code and contradictory durable transitions cannot be rejected.
no_silent_fallback is fixed true, but there is no closed code-bound no-fallback reason.

Required normalized failure domains remain collapsed into broader frozen categories, including capability into compatibility, transform into geometry, trust and integrity into security, and invariant into internal.
The tuple matrix is not a versioned self-hashed policy and emits validation issues rather than one canonical hash-bound decision.

implementation_packet.path_state: All five additive paths remain absent and clean. Frozen v1 and candidate files are read-only for this packet.
implementation_packet.next_action: Hold until MF-P6-09.01 through MF-P6-09.05 are implemented/adopted and exact-project worker routing is qualified; do not dispatch or duplicate while worker lanes remain disabled.

claim_boundary: This audit credits the closed 37-code schema, current deterministic core policy fields and fail-closed unknown-code behavior only. It does not implement exact affected scope, profile impact, lifecycle transition, no-fallback reason, canonical decision, recovery behavior or complete MF-P6-09.06.
